arguments.description: Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration trait

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration trait

data.reasoningText: The user wants to run specific tests filtered by a trait in their xUnit project. Let me look at the project files to understand the setup, then run the filtered tests.

arguments.description: Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration trait

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-a45efeca408e45bfb8b192b25423923f && dotnet test --filter \"Category=Integration\" --no-pager 2>&1 | cat", "description": "Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration trait", "initial_wait": 30}

data.content:
All 5 integration tests passed. The command is:

```
dotnet test --filter "Category=Integration"
```

This uses the `--filter` flag with `Category=Integration` to match xUnit's `[Trait("Category", "Integration")]` attribute.
